description: Intentional inline Flutter strings that are not marketing-owned product copy. Every entry requires a narrow reason.

entries.reason: Composes two already localized range endpoint labels with punctuation only.

Joins an already localized status value with a visual separator.
Joins two separately localized analytics lines with a newline.
